emails.subject: Critical – Security Refund Pay Orders Pending, Affecting Campus Operations
emails.body: Dear Mr Bilal,This is to bring to your attention that campuses have not yet received the security refund pay orders that were sent on October 2, 2025. This delay has resulted in extreme frustration among parents, with several incidents of aggressive behavior and the use of foul language at campuses. Such situations are highly concerning and pose a serious risk to our brand image.It has also been observed that there is no clear communication channel regarding the status of these pay orders at the Accounts office. Even office boys visiting from Bahria and CSC have returned without receiving them, which is causing further inconvenience.You are therefore requested to ensure the dispatch or delivery of all pending pay orders within 3 days and establish a proper communication mechanism for timely status updates in the future.Your immediate attention to this matter is expected and highly necessary to prevent further escalation at the campus level. Regards,Rabia ShafiqAssistant Manager-AdminSchools Directorate KIPS Education SystemMobile No: 03054441057PTCL No: 042-32305477 | EXT: 205

emails.subject: Re: Complaint # KC - 25-10-03 KC Hafizabad Campus Lahore ( Concern Regarding Urdu Teaching by Sir Shamshad – SICSB-1)
emails.body: Respected Maam,I hope this message finds you well. Thank you for bringing this matter to my attention promptly. As the Principal of KIPS Hafizabad Campus, I treat all student feedback with the utmost seriousness, as our primary commitment is to foster a safe, professional, and enriching learning environment.Upon receiving your communication, I immediately initiated a thorough review of the concerns raised by the students of Class SICSB-1 regarding Mr. Shamshad's conduct and teaching methodology. To ensure a fair and comprehensive investigation, I took the following steps:Student Feedback: I personally met with a representative group of students from SICSB-1 to hear their specific experiences. This allowed me to gather detailed, firsthand accounts of the incidents in question.Meeting with Mr. Shamshad: I conducted a private discussion with Mr. Shamshad to understand his perspective on the matter.Findings of the InvestigationBased on the steps above, my findings are as follows:The serious complaints, as mentioned, were not substantiated in my direct meetings with the SICSB-1 students.Mr. Shamshad, who has been a dedicated educator at our campus since August 2022, has no prior formal complaints of this nature on record.His overall conduct has been found appropriate, and his professional record is supported by satisfactory annual board results and consistent performance in in-house examinations.It appears the reported issues were isolated and may stem from transitional factors, such as the recent re-sectioning of second-year classes. It is noteworthy that no complaints were raised during his time with this section during their first year classes.Measurable Corrective Actions ImplementedTo address the concerns raised and prevent any recurrence, we have implemented the following actionable steps: Action ItemDescriptionMandatory Professional DevelopmentMr. Shamshad will attend refresher sessions with the Vice Principal, focusing on the faculty code of conduct and advanced …

emails.subject: DCR LHR BC 04
DCR LHR BC 04
Digital Transformation Workshop at LCCI
emails.body: Worthy Members LCCI,Lahore Chamber of Commerce & Industry is organizing an “Digital Transformation Workshop” in collaboration with Odoo, a Belgian Software Company on Tuesday, October 21, 2025 at 2:30 pm at LCCI The Odoo team travelled from Dubai, giving LCCI members a rare opportunity to interact directly with the creators of one of the world’s leading business management platforms. This exclusive session is tailored for CEOs, CFOs, CTOs, and IT decision makers and aims to: - Digital Transformation and Operational Automation through modern ERP systems. - Showcase how Odoo enables businesses to streamline operations across accounting, inventory, CRM, sales, and HR. - Share real-world success stories from trading, manufacturing and services industries. - Offer hands-on experience and one-on-one advisory for interested participants.Session Details:Timing: 2:30 pm to 5 pmLast date of Registration October 18, 2025FIRST COME FIRST SERVED BASISDon't miss this opportunity!!Online Registration Linkhttps://forms.gle/LsgETdhYaUizAXDk8 https://www.odoo.com/event/odoo-x-lcci-how-digital-transformation-drives-growth-for-businesses-in-pakistan-8987/register All interested members are cordially invited to attend the session as per the above schedule.For further information, please contact:IT Department, LCCIPh: 042-111-222-499 | Ext: 334, 369Email: itdepartment@lcci.org.pk-- You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups "Active-Corporate-Members" group.To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an email to acm+unsubscribe@lcci.org.pk.To view this discussion visit https://groups.google.com/a/lcci.org.pk/d/msgid/acm/CADO%3Dj5x4-W-rKOp_FcmTWScohzgZL2k93pBfUZvx_jRFCu7bXA%40mail.gmail.com.

emails.subject: KP - 2025-10-02 - KP Sargodha Campus ( Withholding of Prize and Unprofessional Conduct)
emails.body: Dear Sir,Assalam-o-alaikumHope you are doing fine. We received this complaint via Email.Details are mentioned below:#DATECAMPUSCLASSPROJECT ISSUEACTION REQUIREDKP - 2025-10-02 17-10-2025Sargodha campusICS 2nd Year KIPS PreparationsWithholding of Prize and Unprofessional ConductRM OfficeCOMPLAINANT WORDS : I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding an unfortunate and disappointing experience my son Muhammad Aliyan Mukhtar, an ICS 2nd Year student of your Sargodha Campus had to face .My son participated in the ET PT Test conducted by KIPS Preparations across Punjab on September 28, 2025, and achieved first position in the province. As a result of this outstanding performance, he was awarded a Certificate of Scholarship and declared eligible for a prize of an Electric Bike along with a 60% tuition fee discount.The result was officially announced on October 5, 2025, and we were informed that the prize and admission could be claimed within 1–2 days. However, due to a sudden death in our immediate family, we were unable to visit the campus within that timeframe.Upon explaining the situation to the Principal , we were told to come on October 13, 2025 to complete the admission process and collect the prize. Following this guidance, we visited the campus on the said date.To our surprise and disappointment, we were then told that the time limit had expired, and that neither the admission could be granted, nor the prize awarded. This directly contradicted what we had previously been told by the campus administration. This lack of clarity and shifting of positions not only caused emotional distress but also reflects poorly on the institution’s internal coordination and handling of merit-based rewards.Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your prompt response and resolution.--KIPS COMPLAINT CELLADDRESS: 49-R Johar Town, Lahore, PakistanMOB: +92 305-444-1148UAN: +42 111-547-775Email: complaint@kips.edu.pk

emails.subject: Printing & Packaging Services - RIZCO PRINTERS
emails.body: Dear Sir / Madam, Hope this finds you well. I am contacting you representing Rizco Printers, one of the leading print houses of Lahore.We are a company of highly trained staff providing one stop customized printing solutions to our customers. From the past few decades, we have been serving our clients with exquisite printing services. During this tenure, Rizco Printers have provided its services to leading local and international businesses including FMCGs, Pharmaceuticals, Confectionery and Bakeries, Publishers and Government Agencies.I understand that Packaging is an essential component of the marketing mix for any product and wanted to inquire if there is a possibility to further discuss the opportunity with you.You can reach me at:Email: rizcoprinters@hotmail.comMobile: 0336-2425695 Regards,Waqas TariqRizco Printers

emails.body: Respected Principal/Director,ٱلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْI hope this email finds you well. As per the instructions, KIPS Narowal was required to share the result data on the result day (October 15,2025). However, the data has still not been received, causing a serious delay in consolidated reporting. You are therefore required to see Worthy EDC in person, today, October 17, 2025 at 4:00 PM at KCO to explain the reasons for this non-compliance. Dr. Yogi Wajahat, Director, Rehman Foundation ii. emails.subject: CITIZEN PARTICIPATORY AUDIT (CPA) EVALUATION OF REFUND PROCESSING BY FBR
emails.body: Respected Members,We would like to inform you that the Office of the Director General Audit (Inland Revenue and Customs), Lahore is conducting a Citizen Participatory Audit to assess the refund processing mechanism (Income Tax and Sales Tax) of the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) for the business community and taxpayers.In this regard, you are kindly requested to share your valuable feedback by completing the survey questionnaire through the Google Form link given below:🔗 https://forms.gle/GLU2dTp8HyGU2Q258Your input will greatly assist in evaluating and improving the efficiency and transparency of the refund process.For any queries or further assistance, please contact:Mr. Imran MahmoodAudit OfficerOffice of the Director General Audit (Inland Revenue and Customs), LahorePh: 042-99212074Cell: 0333-4617478 With best regards, Tax UnitResearch & Development DepartmentLahore Chamber of Commerce & Industry (LCCI) Ph: 042-36365737-42, Ext: 331Email: tax.unit@lcci.org.pk-- You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups "Active-Corporate-Members" group.To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an email to acm+unsubscribe@lcci.org.pk.To view this discussion visit https://groups.google.com/a/lcci.org.pk/d/msgid/acm/CAFFjn0FSJ0N-jaUZS65moqcrw8v27CLUm4PX%3D3MSBnyZ8_%2B9YQ%40mail.gmail.com.

emails.subject: Hiring of Underage Employee – Mr. Ali Raza (RWP BC1)
emails.body: Respected Miss,Refer to the subject, it is to inform you that the hiring documents of Mr. Ali Raza (Office Boy) at RWP BC1, have been received at the HR Department.Upon review, it has been observed that Mr. Ali Raza is currently underage. He joined on 15-Aug-2025, and his documents were received in October 2025. As per legal requirements, employment of individuals below the age of 18 is not permissible.However, considering that Mr. Ali Raza will turn 18 on 27-Oct-2025, HR is proceeding with his case under special consideration, keeping in view the minimal time gap.Going forward, we request the EDC Operations Team to strictly ensure that no individual under the age of 18 is hired, in compliance with labor laws and organizational policies.Your cooperation in adhering to this guideline is highly appreciated. Regards, HR Officer(Muqaddas Iqbal)HR Department
